manufacturer_evidence: Info The Black Diamond is DHD’s true all-rounder — a genuine one-board quiver designed to handle almost anything you’re likely to surf. With extra flotation through the front half for easy paddling and wave entry, it stays forgiving and user-friendly in small, weak surf, while still offering enough performance to handle steeper, better waves when they turn on. It’s a board that covers a lot of ground and suits a wide range of surfers and conditions. Ability: Beginner to AdvancedIdeal Wave Size: 1–6ft+Wave Type: All conditions Size Reference Ride it around your standard shortboard length. The added volume and width up front improve paddle power and make it forgiving across a broad range of surfers, without needing to oversize.

manufacturer_evidence: Info The MF DNA is Mick Fanning’s proven high-performance shortboard for quality waves. Built for control, flow, and precision, it’s the board Mick relied on during his competitive career at events like Bells, Snapper and France. It excels in bigger, punchier surf, but in the right hands it can still come alive in smaller conditions. Quick Size Reference Mick, currently weighs 80kg and is 5’ 10”, typically rides a 5' 10" DNA for 3-6ft Snapper and D’Bah. We recommend you order this board the same length as your standard performance short board.

manufacturer_evidence: Info The Nexus is where innovation meets versatility - a hybrid design combining the rail-to-rail ease of the 3DV with the unmatched speed of the Utopia. Built specifically for beach breaks and wave pools, it’s been tested across multiple pools and a variety of small-wave ocean conditions to ensure it performs everywhere. Loved by our team riders in 1–4ft surf, the Nexus gives you instant acceleration, easy paddle-in, and the ability to glide through flat sections while staying tight and reactive in the pocket. If you want explosive small-wave performance in both the ocean and wave pools, this is the board. Ideal Wave Size: 1–4ftBest For: Intermediate to AdvancedWave Type: Beach breaks, Wave Pools

manufacturer_evidence: Info The Phoenix – Flight is the refined evolution of our best-selling small-wave model, built to make weak surf faster, sharper, and more dynamic. Keeping the original Phoenix DNA—easy paddle-in, instant speed, playful feel—we’ve reworked the outline, rocker, and concaves to push its performance further. With a sleeker nose, a narrowed tail, and a slightly thinner overall profile, the Flight version transitions quicker, turns tighter, and carries more control when the waves step up from knee-high runners to punchier, chest-high sections. Ride it as a thruster, quad, or even a twin—this board is designed to adapt to the day’s conditions and your own style. Ideal Wave Size: 1–3ft (handles up to head high)Skill Level: Intermediate to Advanced

manufacturer_evidence: Built to celebrate Steph’s eighth World Title, the Number 8 is her refined high-performance shortboard — a board shaped from the exact elements she relies on to surf with speed, flow and precision. Inspired directly by Steph’s signature file, it blends a wider “WI Nose” for stability and progression, a narrow round tail for sensitivity, and a reduced tail rocker/concave combo for pure speed. Designed for surfers chasing style, finesse, and that trademark Stephanie Gilmore glide. Surfer Ability: Intermediate – ExpertIdeal Wave Size: 2–6ft WHERE IT SITS IN YOUR QUIVER This is your all-round high-performance shortboard for small-to-good waves — the board you grab when you want to surf fast, clean, and stylish. It suits beachies, points or reefs and sits between your everyday shortboard and your step-up.

manufacturer_evidence: This is one of Ziggy MacKenzie's Sweet Spot step up boards from her 2025 Season. Moderately used, specs are: 5'11 x 16 9/16 x 2 3/16 @ 22.3L The best performing travel board, the ultimate step up! So what’s different from the 3.0? The nose is a touch narrower with more lift, creating less catch up-front when you’re tight in the pocket. A rolled deck provides extra volume in the centre, giving you a lower & more refined rail. The tail has been pulled in, so you can push harder through turns with more manoeuvrability. The 4.0 paddles better, goes faster & can be pushed harder in heavier conditions, when you need it the most! We do not offer warranties on these items, and all sales are final. By purchasing, you acknowledge the unique, pre-loved condition of these team-tested boards. For more info on our Ex-Team boards, or to shop more, please visit our Ex-Team Surfboards page.
